channel.title: Kemal Özkırşehirli Essays
channel.description: AI/ML for science, computational chemistry, protein design, biomolecular simulation, CADD, and essays.

item.title: AI for Science Notes
item.description: A working note on models, molecules, benchmarks, and scientific judgment.

item.title: A Personal Website as a Lab Notebook
item.description: Why a public academic website is a forcing function for sharper research taste.

item.title: How I Read Papers
item.description: A research workflow for turning papers into mechanisms, baselines, and experiments.
